diagrams.title: Basic C++ Program Structure
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the sequential structure of a C++ program from preprocessor directives to return statement

diagrams.title: Data Flow with cin and cout
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how data flows between user, cin, variables, cout, and screen

diagrams.title: C++ Compilation Process
diagrams.description: Shows the stages from source code to execution, highlighting preprocessor phase
